title: Making Friends in a City Where Everyone's Busy
summary: Turn repeated contact into real social momentum.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: You have met people, but none of those chats turned into actual friendships.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: You are social but still feel socially unanchored.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: Friendship is repetition plus low-pressure follow-up, not one perfect event.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Engineer repeat proximity with recurring groups and a shared weekly slot.

Convert good conversations into lightweight next plans quickly.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find clubs, groups, and community spaces near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: The Homesickness Nobody Warns You About - when connection is growing but grief remains.
